scripts.audit:spec: npm run build && node scripts/audit-spec-equivalence.mjs && node scripts/analyze-runtime-diff.mjs
scripts.build:pages: node scripts/prepare-build.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.runtime.json --outDir .build/runtime && node scripts/normalize-generated-scripts.mjs .build/runtime && node scripts/check-generated-scripts.mjs && node scripts/build-pages.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run baseline && npm test && node scripts/check-pages.mjs
